candidate_llm_application: ULI-EPHEMERAL: null-space-initialized LoRA adapter with per-adapter half-life tau and inference-time exponential decay schedule DeltaW(t) = DeltaW(0) * exp(-t*ln2/tau), making the adapter ephemeral-by-design (50% at tau, ~12% at 3tau).

results.title: Learning to Forget Continual Learning Adaptive Weight Decay (2026/04)
results.rationale: FADE applies adaptive per-parameter weight decay learned via meta-gradient during training; it is not an inference-time exponential decay on a null-space LoRA adapter with a per-adapter half-life, so mechanism diverges despite shared 'decay/forget' theme.

results.title: Null-LoRA Low-Rank Adaptation Null Space (2025/12)
results.rationale: Null-LoRA delivers exactly the (a) null-space orthogonal LoRA initialization that forms half of ULI-EPHEMERAL; semantically very close on the null-space-traversal form even though it omits time-decay.

results.title: OPLoRA Orthogonal Projection LoRA
results.rationale: OPLoRA's double-sided orthogonal projections place LoRA updates in subspaces orthogonal to base weights, the same null-space-traversal form the candidate claims; semantic similarity exceeds the 0.7 threshold.

results.title: LUNE Efficient LLM Unlearning LoRA Negative Examples
results.rationale: LUNE achieves LoRA-based unlearning via negative examples (discrete, training-side), not an exponential inference-time magnitude fade, so the functional effect of graceful temporal decay is not realized.

results.title: CLoRA Controlled LoRA Subspace ACL 2025
results.rationale: CLoRA constrains LoRA into an orthogonal subspace via regularization, aligning with the null-space-projection half of the candidate; semantic similarity to 'null-space orthogonal LoRA projection base' clears 0.7.

results.title: Beyond Cosine Decay Infinite LR Schedule Continual Pre-training
results.rationale: This is a training-time learning-rate schedule for continual pre-training, not an inference-time exponential decay of a per-adapter null-space LoRA magnitude, so neither mechanism nor functional effect aligns.

results.title: Continual Learning Catastrophic Forgetting AI Agents (Zylos 2026/04)
results.rationale: Critical-parameter-constrained LoRA continual learning protects prior adapters from being overwritten, but offers no half-life, exponential decay, or null-space init that would constitute ULI-EPHEMERAL's distinctive composition.

results.title: TreeLoRA Continual Learning Layer-Wise LoRAs ICML 2025
results.rationale: TreeLoRA arranges layer-wise LoRA adapters in a hierarchical tree for continual learning; it shares neither the null-space initialization nor the exponential time-decay mechanism, so it does not collide with the candidate.

reason: Three prior works (Null-LoRA 2512.15233, OPLoRA 2510.13003, CLoRA ACL 2025) independently cover the null-space / orthogonal-subspace LoRA initialization that forms component (a) of ULI-EPHEMERAL, with semantic scores at or above 0.7. The candidate's distinctive component (b)-(c) - per-adapter half-life with inference-time exponential magnitude decay - is not itself found in the eight results, but because the null-space-traversal form is already a well-occupied cluster, the rule (sem>=0.7 triggers hit) registers three hits and forces FAIL. The candidate is essentially Null-LoRA composed with an exponential schedule, and the null-space half of the recombination is heavily anticipated.
recommendation: Reframe the novelty around the inference-time exponential half-life schedule itself (e.g., adapter-TTL controller, query-count-driven magnitude annealing) without relying on null-space initialization as the form, or pivot to a non-null-space traversal form where the literature is sparser.
